architecture.summary: Reviewed wrangler.jsonc, consumer.ts, process-submission.ts, scanner.ts, github-permalink.ts, github-discovery.ts, submission-store.ts, submissions route, admin discovery bulk route

scope.summary: 5 changes: queue config bump, GitHub token threading, fast-approve threshold lowering, bulk-enqueue admin endpoint, parallel discovery loop

security.summary: Token threading enables authenticated API calls (5000 req/hr vs 60 unauthenticated). Admin endpoint requires X-Internal-Key or SUPER_ADMIN JWT. No new secrets exposure.

integration.summary: Bulk-enqueue endpoint uses existing createSubmissionsBatch + sendBatch patterns from submissions route. Discovery parallelization uses existing Promise.allSettled pattern.

performance.summary: Queue concurrency 10->20 and batch 3->10 scales throughput ~6x. Parallel discovery replaces sequential for loop. Lower threshold reduces LLM scan load.
